text:
It was a bright, sunny day. Birds were singing, bees were buzzing, and the flowers were bright as rubies. A young girl named Emily was playing with her cat in her garden. Among the roses, she found a small, tiny silvery fish.

"What's this?" Emily petted the fish.

"Puppy!" her cat purr-ed.

Emily was fascinated. She brought the fish inside, naming it Snowball.

Snowball seemed to understand Emily's affectionate nickname. He lounged in her lap while she watched videos on YouTube.

That evening, Snowball danced around her. Emily couldn't stop laughing.

The next morning, Emily woke up dreaming about Snowball leaping through a hoop she had decorated.

By noon, she was preparing breakfast. Just as she flipped a pancake, Snowball leaped out of her pillow and across the floor. Emily chased him around.

"Who knew cats were so acrobatic?" Emily laughed.
